name: Shared permissions fixture evidence
summary: Use public-safe permission snippets to check ACL, group, and traversal triage signals.

fixtures.description: Synthetic namei output showing a blocked traversal component.
Synthetic ACL output showing an ACL mask that removes effective group write access.
Synthetic application log with permission-denied signals.

commands.label: Permission reviewer requires traversal, ACL, and log evidence

checks.label: Traversal fixture contains blocked path and group evidence
ACL fixture contains effective permission mask evidence
Log fixture contains permission failure signal
Permission reviewer keeps evidence paths separate

expected_outcomes: The skill should treat traversal, group membership, setgid inheritance, and ACL masks as separate evidence paths.
The skill should avoid suggesting chmod, chgrp, chown, or setfacl changes without local support review.
